race.comment: REDEMPTION TIME (7) has found it really hard to win another race, but she couldn't be more consistent, with multiple placings this prep. She was third by a neck as the favourite here 3 weeks ago and should go close to winning again. RAGING MONKEY (3) is a durable veteran who fought on gamely last time out from a wide trip at Ballarat-Synthetic 8 days ago. He has the pole position this time, and over his pet trip on his preferred wet ground, he can take this out. COOL THE JETS (1) was not too far away in a tougher field at Morphettville 6 weeks ago, and he should be much more competitive in this company. Stick with him on an each-way basis. HIGHLAND GEORGE (6) resumes from a spell for a new trainer, and with the blinkers back on he could be ready to run a bold race. Follow any market confidence. ROCKCLIFF (2) won here fresh up at this level on a heavy track, and with only an extra 2kg to carry, he can repeat the dose.
